results.prompt: What is the best free CV builder for job seekers in 2026? Give your top 5 with links.
results.responseText:
Creating an effective CV is crucial for job seekers, and several free CV builders offer user-friendly interfaces, ATS-friendly templates, and varying levels of privacy. Here are five top recommendations:



**Teal**  
Teal offers unlimited résumé builds and downloads with a strong focus on ATS tailoring. It provides a job tracker and a Chrome extension to align résumés with job descriptions. The free version includes PDF exports, and the platform is accessible via web browsers. ([techsuggest.io](https://www.techsuggest.io/blog/best-free-ai-resume-builders-2025-whats-actually-free-ats-friendly-and-worth-your-time/?utm_source=openai))




**Resume.org**  
Resume.org is entirely free, including DOCX export, and is marketed as ATS-optimized. It offers guided AI phrasing and allows downloads in PDF, DOCX, and TXT formats. The platform is web-based, ensuring accessibility across devices. ([techsuggest.io](https://www.techsuggest.io/blog/best-free-ai-resume-builders-2025-whats-actually-free-ats-friendly-and-worth-your-time/?utm_source=openai))




**InstaResume**  
InstaResume provides unlimited PDF downloads without requiring payment. It features simple single-column layouts and AI prompts in the builder. The free version includes PDF exports, and the platform is accessible via web browsers. ([techsuggest.io](https://www.techsuggest.io/blog/best-free-ai-resume-builders-2025-whats-actually-free-ats-friendly-and-worth-your-time/?utm_source=openai))




**Canva**  
Canva offers a free editor with a selection of templates, along with AI tools like Magic Write and Magic Design. While it provides PDF downloads, some templates may not be ATS-friendly due to design complexity. The platform is web-based, ensuring accessibility across devices. ([techsuggest.io](https://www.techsuggest.io/blog/best-free-ai-resume-builders-2025-whats-actually-free-ats-friendly-and-worth-your-time/?utm_source=openai))




**Google Docs**  
Google Docs provides free, simple resume templates that are easy to edit and ATS-friendly. It allows exports in PDF or DOCX formats and is accessible via web browsers, ensuring cross-device compatibility. ([rephrasely.com](https://rephrasely.com/blog/best-free-resume-builders-in-2026?utm_source=openai))


When choosing a CV builder, consider factors such as the complexity of your desired design, the importance of ATS compatibility, and your privacy preferences. Web-based platforms offer convenience and accessibility, while local-only tools may provide enhanced privacy by storing data solely on your device.

results.prompt: Recommend free resume builders that let me export PDF without forcing paid plans.
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free resume builders that allow you to export your resume as a PDF without requiring a paid plan:



**ResBuilder**  
Offers unlimited PDF and Word downloads with no watermarks or ads. Your data remains private, stored locally on your device. Provides a variety of professional templates and cover letter options. ([resbuilder.com](https://resbuilder.com/?utm_source=openai))




**Free Resume Builder**  
Allows unlimited resume creation and PDF exports without watermarks. Data is stored locally on your device, ensuring privacy. Features a clean, user-friendly interface with customizable templates. ([free-resume.net](https://free-resume.net/?utm_source=openai))




**CVCompose**  
Provides free and professional templates with PDF export capabilities. Offers ATS-friendly designs and does not require a subscription. Data is stored locally on your device, maintaining privacy. ([cvcompose.com](https://www.cvcompose.com/us?utm_source=openai))




**10xTools Resume Builder**  
Offers three professional templates with free PDF export. No account creation is required, and your data is stored locally on your device. ATS-friendly formatting is included. ([10xtools.io](https://www.10xtools.io/resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**AdaptiT Resume Builder**  
Creates ATS-friendly resumes with AI-powered suggestions. Completely free with instant PDF download and no sign-up required. Data is stored locally on your device, ensuring privacy. ([adaptit.pro](https://adaptit.pro/resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))


These platforms prioritize user privacy by storing data locally on your device and offer free PDF exports without watermarks or hidden fees.

results.prompt: I want a CV builder where I can keep data local in my browser. What tools should I use?
results.responseText:
Here are 5 CV builders that allow you to keep your data local in your browser, ensuring privacy and security by avoiding cloud storage. These tools generally export ATS-friendly formats like PDF and Word:

1. **Resume Builder by Novoresume (Local Mode)**
   - Allows you to create and edit resumes fully in-browser.
   - You can save resumes locally without uploading to a cloud.
   - ATS-friendly templates.
   - Link: https://novoresume.com/

2. **Resume.com**
   - Resume creation happens entirely client-side in your browser.
   - You save the resume as a PDF or Word file locally.
   - No forced cloud storage; good for privacy.
   - Link: https://www.resume.com/

3. **Standard Resume**
   - Simple, no-frills resume builder.
   - Works offline in your browser; data is not stored on the cloud unless you create an account.
   - Exports ATS-compatible PDFs.
   - Link: https://standardresume.co/

4. **Canva (Offline Mode with Desktop App)**
   - Canva has a desktop app that can store work locally.
   - Resume templates that are visually appealing and ATS-friendly if done carefully.
   - You control when and if you upload or save to the cloud.
   - Link: https://www.canva.com/

5. **Enhancv (Offline Editing via Export/Import)**
   - Primarily cloud-based but allows you to export and edit resumes offline.
   - You can download an editable file, then use text editors locally.
   - ATS-friendly formats.
   - Link: https://enhancv.com/

For greatest privacy, focus on tools explicitly stating local data handling or offline capability. Always export your resume file to keep your data securely on your device.

results.prompt: Which resume tools support local-first editing and optional cloud sync?
results.responseText:
Here are five resume builders that support local-first editing with optional cloud synchronization:

1. **ATS Resume Maker**  
   ATS Resume Maker operates entirely offline, storing your resume data locally in your browser's storage. It offers optional GitHub synchronization for multi-device access, allowing you to back up your data to a private repository. This approach ensures your data remains private and secure. ([ats-resume-maker.com](https://ats-resume-maker.com/features/local-first/?utm_source=openai))

2. **PrivateCV**  
   PrivateCV is a privacy-focused resume builder that stores your resume data locally in your browser's storage. It does not require an account, and all processing is done locally, ensuring your data remains private. While it doesn't offer built-in cloud synchronization, you can manually export your resume and store it in your preferred cloud service. ([privatecv.app](https://www.privatecv.app/blog/resume-builder-no-account?utm_source=openai))

3. **OpenResume**  
   OpenResume is an open-source resume builder that stores your resume data locally in your browser's storage. It doesn't require an account, and all processing is done locally, ensuring your data remains private. You can manually export your resume and store it in your preferred cloud service for synchronization. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))

4. **Reactive Resume**  
   Reactive Resume is an open-source resume builder that stores your resume data locally in your browser's storage. It doesn't require an account, and all processing is done locally, ensuring your data remains private. You can manually export your resume and store it in your preferred cloud service for synchronization. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))

5. **FlowCV**  
   FlowCV is a resume builder that allows you to create resumes without an account, storing your data locally in your browser's storage. While it doesn't offer built-in cloud synchronization, you can manually export your resume and store it in your preferred cloud service. ([privatecv.app](https://www.privatecv.app/blog/resume-builder-no-account?utm_source=openai))

These tools prioritize privacy by storing your data locally and offer options for cloud synchronization, either through manual export or optional integrations.

results.prompt: What are the best Resume.io alternatives for someone who needs a free option?
results.responseText:
If you're seeking free alternatives to Resume.io for building an ATS-friendly resume, here are five top recommendations:



**Indeed Resume Builder**  
A completely free tool that integrates seamlessly with Indeed's job portal, allowing for easy application submissions. It offers a straightforward interface with basic customization options and ensures ATS compatibility. However, it provides a limited selection of templates and design features. ([resumefast.io](https://www.resumefast.io/blog/resume-builders-comparison-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Novoresume**  
Tailored for students and early-career professionals, Novoresume offers templates optimized for limited experience, focusing on education and transferable skills. The free version allows for one single-page resume with basic features, including a skills matcher against job descriptions. Some templates may not be ATS-friendly, and premium features are behind a paywall. ([resumefast.io](https://www.resumefast.io/blog/resume-builders-comparison-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Zety**  
Zety provides a guided resume-building process with a variety of templates and an ATS Resume Checker to ensure compatibility. The free version allows unlimited resume building and editing, but downloads are restricted to plain text format. PDF or Word exports require a Pro Package subscription. ([pitchmeai.com](https://pitchmeai.com/blog/best-free-resume-builders?utm_source=openai))




**Canva**  
Known for its extensive library of visually appealing templates, Canva offers a free tier with full access to many designs. It provides complete design customization and is ideal for creative portfolios. However, resumes created in Canva may not be ATS-compatible, as the text can be embedded in ways that ATS systems can't read. ([resumefast.io](https://www.resumefast.io/blog/resume-builders-comparison-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Teal**  
Teal offers unlimited free resume creation and downloads with AI-generated bullet points. It also includes an integrated job application tracker, making it particularly useful for active job seekers managing multiple opportunities. The free version provides a solid set of features, with premium options available for additional functionalities. ([pitchmeai.com](https://pitchmeai.com/blog/best-free-resume-builders?utm_source=openai))


Each of these platforms offers unique features to assist in crafting an effective resume. Consider your specific needs, such as the importance of ATS compatibility, design customization, and integration with job portals, to choose the best fit for your career objectives.

results.prompt: Give me alternatives to Zety that are free and good for ATS resumes.
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free, ATS-friendly resume builders that serve as excellent alternatives to Zety:



**Rezuma**  
An AI-powered resume builder that automatically generates tailored resumes and cover letters optimized for ATS. It offers a free plan with no credit card required and provides ATS compatibility checks. ([rezuma.co](https://www.rezuma.co/?utm_source=openai))




**ResumeFlex**  
A free, no-signup-required tool that allows users to create ATS-friendly resumes with real-time ATS scoring. It offers professional templates and instant feedback on resume compatibility. ([resumeflex.io](https://resumeflex.io/?utm_source=openai))




**ShipResume**  
Designed for the U.S. job market, ShipResume provides ATS-optimized templates tested with Fortune 500 ATS systems. It offers unlimited free downloads without watermarks, making it ideal for both entry-level candidates and experienced professionals. ([shipresume.com](https://shipresume.com/us/?utm_source=openai))




**JobScoutly**  
A free resume builder that uses AI to analyze job descriptions and optimize resumes accordingly. It offers ATS-friendly templates and instant PDF downloads, along with a smart job board featuring over 50,000 openings. ([jobscoutly.com](https://jobscoutly.com/?utm_source=openai))




**ResumeWand**  
An AI-driven resume builder that creates ATS-friendly resumes with a 97% ATS pass rate. It offers free, unlimited resume creation and downloads, with real-time ATS compatibility scores and suggestions. ([resumewand.com](https://resumewand.com/ats-resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))


These tools provide free access to ATS-friendly resume building features, with some offering additional premium options for advanced functionalities.

results.prompt: Which CV builders are ATS friendly and fast for applying to tech jobs?
results.responseText:
When applying for tech jobs, it's crucial to use a resume builder that produces ATS-friendly resumes efficiently. Here are five top recommendations:



**Teal AI Resume Builder**  
Teal offers a free AI-powered resume builder that creates custom, ATS-friendly resumes in minutes. It provides unlimited downloads, instant job matching, and smart suggestions to enhance your resume. You can import your current resume or LinkedIn profile to start quickly. ([tealhq.com](https://www.tealhq.com/tools/ai-resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Jobscan Resume Builder**  
Jobscan's free resume builder allows you to import an existing resume, create one from scratch, or import your LinkedIn profile. It offers nine ATS-friendly resume templates and provides personalized job listings. The platform also includes a resume scanner to optimize your resume for ATS compatibility. ([jobscan.co](https://www.jobscan.co/resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))




**ApplyEngine AI Resume Builder**  
ApplyEngine.ai provides an AI-powered platform with $120 in free credits for new users. It scans your resume against job descriptions for ATS scores up to 95%, offering real-time scoring and section-by-section editing to ensure your resume parses flawlessly. ([applyengine.ai](https://applyengine.ai/guide/whats-the-best-ats-friendly-resume-builder-free-171?utm_source=openai))




**KraftCV Resume Builder**  
KraftCV is a desktop-first resume builder designed specifically for tech candidates. It offers eight free templates optimized for ATS parseability, unlimited PDF exports without watermarks, LinkedIn PDF import for quick resume creation, and GitHub integration that pulls repository data directly into your resume. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Wozber Resume Builder**  
Wozber is a free resume builder focused entirely on ATS compatibility. It offers clean and professional templates, a job-matching tool that checks how well your resume aligns with a specific job posting, and free PDF exports. The platform emphasizes simplicity and effectiveness without hidden charges or watermarks. ([gauravtiwari.org](https://gauravtiwari.org/best-resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))


These tools are designed to help you create ATS-friendly resumes quickly, enhancing your chances of securing tech job interviews.

results.prompt: Top ATS resume builders for software engineers, with template variety and PDF export.
results.responseText:
Here are five top ATS-friendly resume builders suitable for software engineers, each offering a variety of templates and PDF export options:



**Novorésumé**  
Offers a range of ATS-optimized templates with clean, single-column layouts. Provides a free tier allowing one resume with PDF export. Premium plans start at $21.99 per month, unlocking additional features like multipage layouts and matching cover letters. ([thefasthire.org](https://thefasthire.org/ats-ready-resume-builders-for-customer-service/?utm_source=openai))




**KraftCV**  
Designed specifically for tech professionals, KraftCV offers eight free templates tailored for software engineers. Features include GitHub integration for automatic repository data import and LinkedIn PDF import for quick resume creation. The free version includes unlimited PDF exports without watermarks. Premium features are available with a paid plan. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Rezi**  
Provides ATS-friendly resume templates with a focus on content hierarchy and keyword optimization. Offers a free version with one resume and PDF export. Premium plans start at $29 per month, unlocking additional features like AI-powered content suggestions and multiple resume versions. ([rezi.ai](https://www.rezi.ai/resume-templates?utm_source=openai))




**Resume.io**  
Features a variety of ATS-optimized templates with a user-friendly drag-and-drop interface. The free version allows building resumes, but downloading requires a paid trial. Exports are available in PDF and Word formats. ([thefasthire.org](https://thefasthire.org/ats-ready-resume-builders-for-customer-service/?utm_source=openai))




**FlowCV**  
Offers over 50 free resume templates with no watermarks and unlimited PDF downloads. Templates are ATS-ready and available in various professional styles. The platform provides an online editor for easy customization. ([ezcareers.ai](https://www.ezcareers.ai/blog/free-ats-resume-templates-that-actually-pass-applicant-tracking-systems-in-2025/?utm_source=openai))


Each of these platforms provides a combination of free and premium features, allowing you to choose based on your specific needs and budget.

results.prompt: Best CV builder for UK job applications with professional templates and no paywall.
results.responseText:
Here are five free CV builders suitable for UK job applications, each offering professional templates without paywalls:

1. **YourBestCV**: Tailored for the UK job market, YourBestCV provides an intuitive interface with over 50 professional templates. The platform is entirely free, allowing unlimited CV creation and downloads without hidden fees. It also offers customization options to align with your personal brand. ([yourbestcv.com](https://yourbestcv.com/uk/?utm_source=openai))

2. **MojCV**: MojCV offers a collection of ATS-optimized CV templates, all available for free without watermarks or paywalls. The platform allows unlimited PDF downloads and does not require registration, ensuring a straightforward and private experience. ([mojcv.com](https://mojcv.com/?utm_source=openai))

3. **AdaptIt.pro**: Designed specifically for the UK job market, AdaptIt.pro provides a free CV builder with professional templates and ATS optimization. The platform offers a premium AI version for advanced features at £4.99, but the free version remains robust and entirely free. ([adaptit.pro](https://adaptit.pro/resume-builder/uk/?utm_source=openai))

4. **BuzzCV**: BuzzCV offers a completely free CV builder with over 20 high-quality templates. The platform includes features like a built-in spelling check and cover letter templates, all without paywalls or hidden fees. ([buzzcv.com](https://buzzcv.com/?utm_source=openai))

5. **FlowCV**: FlowCV provides a privacy-focused, free resume builder with over 50 customizable templates. The platform allows unlimited downloads of ATS-friendly PDFs without watermarks or paywalls, ensuring a professional and private experience. ([resumatic.ai](https://www.resumatic.ai/articles/the-11-best-free-resume-builder-options-for-2025-analyzed-ranked?utm_source=openai))

Each of these platforms offers a user-friendly experience with professional templates suitable for UK job applications, all without paywalls or hidden fees.

results.prompt: What free CV builders work well for London/UK job seekers?
results.responseText:
Here are five free CV builders suitable for London and UK job seekers, each offering ATS-friendly outputs and varying privacy considerations:



**YourBestCV**  
Tailored for the UK job market, YourBestCV provides professional templates and an intuitive interface. It offers a free version with customizable designs and allows direct downloads in PDF format. The platform operates entirely online, storing your data on their servers. ([yourbestcv.com](https://yourbestcv.com/uk/?utm_source=openai))




**LiveCareer**  
LiveCareer offers an AI-powered CV builder with over forty recruiter-approved templates. The free version includes smart suggestions and real-time edits. Users can download their CVs in PDF or DOC formats. Data is processed and stored on LiveCareer’s cloud servers. ([livecareer.co.uk](https://www.livecareer.co.uk/?utm_source=openai))




**AdaptIt.pro**  
Designed specifically for British employers, AdaptIt.pro provides a free AI resume generator with ATS-friendly templates. The free version includes modern UK CV templates and allows PDF downloads. Data is processed and stored on AdaptIt.pro’s cloud servers. ([adaptit.pro](https://adaptit.pro/resume-builder/uk/?utm_source=openai))




**CV-Library**  
As a UK-based job board, CV-Library offers a free CV builder with a single template and basic customization options. The free version allows PDF downloads. Data is processed and stored on CV-Library’s cloud servers. ([topcv.co.uk](https://topcv.co.uk/career-advice/best-cv-makers?utm_source=openai))




**Canva**  
Canva provides a free CV builder with a vast selection of stylish templates and a drag-and-drop editor. The free version allows PDF downloads. Data is processed and stored on Canva’s cloud servers. ([workajobs.com](https://www.workajobs.com/blog/free-cv-builder?utm_source=openai))


All these platforms offer free versions suitable for UK job seekers, with varying levels of customization and privacy considerations. While some operate entirely online, others may offer offline options. It's advisable to review each platform's privacy policy to understand how your data is handled.
